title: NPI and taxonomy correctness
headline: 100.0000% of 10.9M NDH NPIs pass structural + Luhn validation (3 failing records: 1 structural, 2 Luhn checksum). 188,366 Practitioner/Organization resources carry no us-npi identifier.
notes: H9 only — Practitioner: 7,441,210 OK / 1 invalid structure / 2 Luhn fail / 0 missing. Organization: 3,414,896 OK / 0 invalid / 0 Luhn fail / 188,366 missing. H10 (NPPES existence), H11 (name agreement), H12 (NUCC taxonomy), H13 (specialty agreement) pending the NPPES monthly file + NUCC code set joins.
